text:
--On tisdag, januari 15, 2008 10.24.13 +0100 Martin Matuska 
<mm@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Yes you are right, it is the same package.
> But if you want to add new OPTIONS you have to bump PORTREVISION.

If they are default true, then yes, you are right. And XML is default true, 
so again, you're right. ;-)

/P
